mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_DepartmentMembersList(id, userid, name, open_userid, main_department, position, mobile, status, createTime, updateTime) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userid}, #{item.name}, #{item.openUserid}, #{item.mainDepartment}, #{item.position}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.status}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM VX_DepartmentMembersList WHERE userid = #{userid}

SELECT userid, name FROM VX_DepartmentMembersList WHERE userid IN
#{userid}
